title: The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026
details: Highlights: Hanoi City Tour, Tran Quoc Pagoda, Hoan Kiem Lake, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Halong Bay Cruise, Paradise Grotto, Wooden Stakes Cave, Water Puppet Show, Megaworld Hanoi, and Quang Phu Cau Incense Village. Experience Vietnam’s historic capital and world-famous natural wonder in one unforgettable journey.
flyer: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026/Flyer_main.png

itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Hanoi. Meet and greet with tour guide. Flight: MNL–HAN 5J744 05:10–07:40. Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda, State Theater, St. Joseph Cathedral, Ly Thai To Statue, Dong Xuan Market, and Hoan Kiem Lake. Lunch and dinner at local restaurants. Overnight in Hanoi.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026/Day1_1770002806.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, proceed with Hanoi City Tour: Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Temple of Literature. Buffet lunch at Sen Tay Ho. Shopping stops at ABC Shop, Dai Viet Shop, and Ngoc Thien Shop. Dinner at local restaurant. Transfer to Halong and overnight.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026/Day2_1770002809.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, enjoy a half-day Halong Bay Cruise. Visit Paradise Grotto and Wooden Stakes Cave. Lunch served onboard with fresh seafood. Return to Hanoi. Watch a Water Puppet Show. Dinner at local restaurant. Overnight in Hanoi.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026/Day3_1770002882.png

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Hanoi – Quang Phu Cau – Megaworld – Departure (B/L)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit Quang Phu Cau Incense Village. Lunch at local restaurant. Visit Megaworld Hanoi. Free time shopping at Old Quarter. Transfer to airport for departure.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Hanoi & Halong Bay Cruise Experience 2026/Day4_1770002919.png

itinerary.day_details: Flight back to Manila. HAN–MNL 5J747 08:25–01:00. Home sweet home!

inclusions: 1 night hotel accommodation in Halong Bay (4★)
Full board meals as per itinerary
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Halong Bay Cruise Tour with lunch
Entrance fees, boat trips, and admission fees
extra_details: Full payment due 45 days before travel date
Itineraries are subject to change without prior notice due to local circumstances.
